title: Kabo Yellow first victory
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Kwanokuthula-based side Kabo Yellow Football Club, orchestrated a well-deserved win when they bested Fast Eleven 2-1 in a tough Safa Eden HollywoodBets Regional League encounter on Saturday afternoon, 25 January at the Lawaaikamp stadium.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Kwanokuthula-based side Kabo Yellow Football Club, orchestrated a well-deserved win when they bested Fast Eleven 2-1 in a tough Safa Eden HollywoodBets Regional League encounter on Saturday afternoon, 25 January at the Lawaaikamp stadium."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"To win the game, Awonke Sondaba scored a brace for Kabo Yellow, while Anele Ntloko converted the only goal for the home team Fast Eleven."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The home side, Fast Eleven FC kicked off the game from the centre half building their passes at the back line.","html":"The home side, Fast Eleven FC kicked off the game from the centre half building their passes at the back line."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kabo Yellow launched their positive moves - attacking on the flanks employing the pace of Awonke Sondaba and Shitto Mzanywa looking for their first goal of the game.","html":"Kabo Yellow launched their positive moves - attacking on the flanks employing the pace of Awonke Sondaba and Shitto Mzanywa looking for their first goal of the game."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in the weeks' edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald.","html":"Read more in the weeks' edition of the Knysna-Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
